allow: PowerShell(cd "I:\\FastHostel-main"; $proc = Start-Process -NoNewWindow -PassThru -FilePath "flutter" -ArgumentList "run -d web-server --web-port 8080" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Temp\\flutter_run.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Temp\\flutter_err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 30; Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\flutter_run.log" -Tail 30; Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\flutter_err.log" -Tail 10; $proc.Kill\(\))

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "C:\\Temp" | Out-Null; cd "I:\\FastHostel-main"; $proc = Start-Process -NoNewWindow -PassThru -FilePath "flutter" -ArgumentList "run -d web-server --web-port 8080" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Temp\\flutter_run.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Temp\\flutter_err.log"; Write-Output "PID: $\($proc.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 45; Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\flutter_run.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 30; Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\flutter_err.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 15; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) })
